data.title: Real Estate Expert Teresa Liepman Explains Mortgage Pre-Approval for a Smoother Home Buying Process in HelloNation
data.description: In Texarkana, Texas on July 1, 2026, real estate expert Teresa Liepman from Better Homes and Gardens Real Estate Infinity suggests the smartest approach to reducing home-buying stress. As per HelloNation, Liepman recommends obtaining a mortgage pre-approval before initiating a house hunt.

data.title: Visual Comfort & Co. Opens New Showroom in Dallas, Texas
data.description: Visual Comfort & Co. has revealed the unveiling of its second showroom in Dallas on July 1, 2026. Spanning an impressive 4,400 square feet, the showroom is situated in the vibrant Knox neighborhood of Dallas. The new location aims to showcase the company's array of designer lighting collaborations, featuring renowned names such as Kelly Wearstler. The showroom serves as a destination for those seeking premium lighting solutions in the region.

data.title: Freedom Holding Corp. Receives BRSA Approval to Acquire Turkish Bank
data.description: The approval from regulators is a significant step forward in the establishment of Freedom's comprehensive financial platform in Türkiye. This milestone signifies progress in developing a full range of financial services in the country.

data.title: Skip Summer, Chase the Cold: How the Wealthy Are Rewriting Luxury Travel in 2026
data.description: A recent report on 2026 booking trends by Global Travel Collection, a renowned network of luxury travel advisors, highlights significant changes in travel preferences. The data shows a shift towards fall bookings surpassing summer reservations, cooler destinations preferred over hot ones, and Italy's less crowded neighboring countries gaining popularity. The findings suggest a shift in travel behavior towards more temperate locations and less touristy destinations.

Venezuela's death toll from last week's twin earthquakes rose to 1,943, Venezuelan Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez said. Rodriguez said the number of injured had reached 10,571 and that 15,866 people had been left homeless by the disaster.
Nextensa and Promobe finalize the sale of Stairs S.à r.l. to State Street Services Luxembourg.

data.title: Monomoy Capital Partners Completes Acquisition of Jiffy Lube from Shell
data.description: Monomoy Capital Partners, a private investment firm specializing in private equity and credit investing in the middle market, has successfully acquired Jiffy Lube International, Inc., the primary quick lube and automotive service franchisor in North America, from a Shell USA, Inc. subsidiary for around $1.3 billion. This acquisition, which was announced through a definitive agreement on March 9, 2026, marks a significant milestone for Monomoy Capital Partners. Jiffy Lube International, Inc. was established in 1979 and is headquartered in New York.

data.title: Advanced Energy Stock Near Buy Point As Chip Gear Firm Upgraded
data.description: The stock of Advanced Energy is close to a buy point after receiving a new buy rating for the semiconductor equipment company. Despite this positive development, AEIS stock experienced a decline on Wednesday. This news comes as the company's stock performance continues to be closely monitored by investors.

data.title: China EV Sales: BYD's Soars Overseas, Leapmotor Has Best Month Of 2026
data.description: After a challenging beginning to the year, BYD is making a significant comeback, as per recent data. In addition to BYD, other competitors in the electric vehicle market such as XPeng and Xiaomi also experienced notable growth in June. The latest figures indicate that BYD's overseas sales have soared, while Leapmotor achieved its best month of the year in 2026.

data.title: Meta Stock Rallies On Reported Plan For AI Cloud Business; CoreWeave Slides
data.description: Meta's stock saw a significant increase following reports that the parent company of Facebook intends to provide its extensive AI cloud infrastructure to enterprises. This led to a surge in Meta's stock price, while competitor CoreWeave experienced a decline in their stocks. The news was reported by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting Meta's strategic move in expanding its services to business clients.

data.title: NEW PRODUCT: Dual Hazardous Location Cabinet Cooler Systems Protect Large Electrical Enclosures in Classified Areas
data.description: In Cincinnati on July 1, 2026, EXAIR introduced its Dual Hazardous Location Cabinet Cooler® Systems designed to safeguard large electrical enclosures in hazardous settings. These systems are specifically created for classified areas such as Class I Div 1, covering Groups A, B, C. The coolers offer a robust and maintenance-free solution for protection.

data.title: GCG Advisory Partners Completes Its Multi-Platform Strategy, Now Offering Hybrid RIA Optionality with the Addition of BlueChip Financial Advisors
data.description: GCG Advisory Partners (GCG) has successfully formed a strategic alliance with Fidelity Institutional Wealth Services, marking their initial custodial association. This collaboration also signifies GCG's entrance into the wider Southern New England market. The development was disclosed in Charlotte, N.C., on July 1, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- RELEX Solutions/
data.description: In a recent update, RELEX Solutions announced on June 26, 2026, that MOM's Organic Market will be enhancing its fresh supply chain planning with their assistance. This collaboration aims to improve the efficiency of MOM's Organic Market's operations and enhance the overall supply chain process. The partnership signifies a significant step forward for both companies. The specific details of the changes made were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: DISCLOSURE  OF THE NUMBER OF SHARES FORMING THE CAPITAL  AND OF THE TOTAL NUMBER OF VOTING RIGHTS  AS OF 30 JUNE 2026
data.description: A French corporation operating as a public limited company (société anonyme) has a substantial share capital totaling €1,464,729,242.50. The company is headquartered at 1973, boulevard de la Défense in Nanterre, France, and is registered under the number 552 037 806 with the Nanterre Commercial and Companies Registry. More information is available on their website at www.vinci.com.
